name: Sicarus
description: The Sicarus fires 3-round bursts, which provides a balance between the lethality of auto-pistols and the accuracy of semi-automatic pistols.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Oscira Pistol Skin not properly applying to the Sicarus Prime.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Prime Vault: 29.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Ember Prime, Frost Prime, Latron Prime, Reaper Prime, Sicarus Prime, and Glaive Prime Relics have been added back to the droptables!

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.11.1
patchlogs.changes: Ember Prime, Frost Prime, Loki Prime, Wyrm Prime, Bo Prime, Sicarus Prime, Glaive Prime, Latron Prime, and Reaper Prime Relics have been added as Cetus Bounty rewards for a limited time. You can also find these limited Vaulted Relics in Relic Packs from the Market or as Syndicate rewards.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.additions: The Latron, Sicarus, and Hikou have all received PBR treatment.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sicarus Prime having wrong values in Conclave

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Increased damage of Sicarus series in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Shield Lancers in the Mastery Rank 3 test being equipped with Sicarus’ and causing significantly more damage.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Update 2
patchlogs.changes: Lex Prime, Paris Prime, Dakra Prime, Sicarus Prime, and Ankyros Prime have received the PBR treatment!

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes: Sicarus series damage increased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.5
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage of Sicarus weapons in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.16 + Tactical Alert!
patchlogs.changes: Increased ammo capacity for Sicarus Prime to be a proper multiple of 3 (from 20 to 21).

patchlogs.name: Update 11: Valkyr Unleashed
patchlogs.additions: New Prime Gear: Ember, Glaive, and Sicarus! Find it all in the Void Today or through Prime Access https://warframe.com/prime-access
